---
title: "instantaneous_phase"
generated: true
description: "Unwrapped instantaneous phase of the analytic signal."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.signal.fourier`](../nitrix-signal-fourier.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:instantaneous_phase -->
```python
instantaneous_phase(X: Float[Array, '...'], *, axis: int = -1, n: Optional[int] = None, period: float = 2 * math.pi) -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:instantaneous_phase -->
Unwrapped instantaneous phase of the analytic signal.

Computed as the unwrapped argument of the analytic signal,
$\operatorname{unwrap}(\arg(X_a))$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:instantaneous_phase -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `X` | `Float` | `...` | — | Real-valued signal. |
| `axis` | `int` | — | `-1` | Axis along which the phase is taken and unwrapped. Default `-1`. |
| `n` | `Optional[int]` | — | `None` | FFT length. `None` (default) uses `X.shape[axis]`; a larger `n` zero-pads. |
| `period` | `float` | — | `2 * math.pi` | Size of the range over which the phase wraps, passed to the unwrapping step. Default $2\pi$. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...`. Unwrapped phase of `X`, same shape as `X` (or with the `axis` resized to `n`).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:instantaneous_phase -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
